flags.message: The cell context says forward, but the provisioned snapshot contains a 2024-09-24 docket entry described as 'Opinion Issued.' The entry has no opinion text or disposition. I did not inspect the outcome artifact, seek the opinion, or use the marker to infer direction; the forecast uses the earlier procedural record only.

Both optional retrieval paths were unavailable: CourtListener MCP lacked its session-store configuration, and the ranged corpus remote failed DNS resolution. The prediction was completed from provisioned inputs and the committed statpack.
